gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking on the health and metrics of all the community apps in our ecosystem.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, checking on small code-plants (representing community apps) in a greenhouse with a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a small clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants in a lime green (#ecf874) greenhouse. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a small clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants in a lime green (#ecf874) greenhouse. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
